title: trichelostylis angularis
intro: Trichelostylis angularis, also known as the Angular-stemmed Thistle, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Trichelostylis angularis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infused tea, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or dried herb for various herbal preparations.
